zh.lifeSummary: 當William Gibbons於1558年出生在英國瓦維其可爾蕾托 塞頓時，他的父親Sir John Gibbons of East Yorkshire30歲，母親Lady Joan Marsh23歲。他於1587年與Ann Harmon在英國奧可福爾迪其利結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1623年在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Gibbons于1558年出生在英国瓦維其可爾蕾托 塞頓时，他的父亲Sir John Gibbons of East Yorkshire30岁，母亲Lady Joan Marsh23岁。他于1587年与Ann Harmon在英国奧可福爾迪其利结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1623年在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gibbons
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): variant of Gibbon , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.
Irish (Mayo): in Ireland, the name is frequent and has been Gaelicized as Mac Giobúin. It is also found as a variant of Fitzgibbon .

variants.name: Gibbens
meanings: German: patronymic from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name formed with geba ‘gift’.

variants.name: Gibbon
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Giboin (ancient Germanic Gebawin).
English: alternatively, a diminutive of the personal name   Gibb  .
Scottish and Irish: variant of   McGibbon  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When William Gibbons was born in 1558, in Little Sutton, Warwickshire, England, his father, Sir John Gibbons of East Yorkshire, was 30 and his mother, Lady Joan Marsh, was 23. He married Ann Harmon in 1587, in Ditchley, Oxfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1623, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Gibbons est né en 1558, à Little Sutton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Gibbons of East Yorkshire, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lady Joan Marsh, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Ann Harmon en 1587, à Ditchley, Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1623, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Gibbons 1558 in Little Sutton, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Gibbons of East Yorkshire 30 und seine Mutter Lady Joan Marsh 23. Er hat 1587 in Ditchley, Oxfordshire, England Ann Harmon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1623 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Gibbons è nato il nel 1558 nel Little Sutton, Warwickshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Gibbons of East Yorkshire, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Lady Joan Marsh, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Ann Harmon nel 1587, nel Ditchley, Oxfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1623, nel Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Gibbonsが1558年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアリットル スットオンで生まれた時，父Sir John Gibbons of East Yorkshireは30歳，母Lady Joan Marshは23歳であった。1587年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアディトチリーでAnn Harmonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1623年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Gibbons(이)가 1558년 영국 워윅실르 리틀 수턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Gibbons of East Yorkshire(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Joan Marsh(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1587년 영국 스퍼드실르 딧클리에서 Ann Harmon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1623년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Gibbons nasceu em 1558, em Little Sutton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Gibbons of East Yorkshire, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Lady Joan Marsh, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Ann Harmon em 1587, em Ditchley, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1623, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Gibbons родился в 1558 г. в местности литл суттон, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Gibbons of East Yorkshire было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Joan Marsh, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Ann Harmon в 1587 г. в местности дичли, оксфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1623 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Gibbons nació en 1558, en Little Sutton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Gibbons of East Yorkshire, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Lady Joan Marsh, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Ann Harmon en 1587, en Ditchley, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1623, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 65 años.
